description: Anchor the section in official or first-party materials when those exist.
default_source_hints: Official documentation, reports, repos, papers, or disclosures

description: Collect mechanism-level implementation evidence such as architecture, workflows, APIs, or code paths.
default_source_hints: Official blogs, code repos, and API docs

description: Break the subject into modules, components, products, or subsystems.
default_source_hints: Source material that decomposes the subject into major parts

description: Collect geographic, market, or regional segmentation evidence.
Compare the subject against peers, alternatives, or benchmarks.
Build a dated chronology of milestones, evolution, or progress.
default_source_hints: Chronological primary sources and milestone references

description: Support claims with explicit metrics, KPIs, or time-series values.
default_source_hints: Structured metrics, KPI tables, or time-series data

description: Explain causal drivers, decomposition, bridges, or computed relationships.
default_source_hints: Evidence needed to derive or decompose the claimed mechanism

description: Map suppliers, upstream/downstream roles, and ecosystem dependencies.
